metadata.name: aws-vpc-prod
metadata.title: 3-Tier Enterprise Network
metadata.description: Enterprise-grade networking foundation for production workloads. 3-AZ deployment with public/private/isolated subnets, 3 NAT Gateways for HA, S3-based flow logs with lifecycle policies, Network ACLs, and SSM endpoints.
metadata.author: InnovativeApps
features: Redundant NAT Gateways (one per AZ) to eliminate single points of failure
Network ACLs for defense-in-depth subnet-level security (enabled by default)
S3-based VPC Flow Logs with 30-day lifecycle retention (enabled by default)
SSM VPC Endpoints for secure Systems Manager access (enabled by default, +$42/mo)
Private S3 and DynamoDB access via Gateway Endpoints (free)
Zero-trust security pattern with strict security group templates
Optional: RDS VPC Endpoint for database API calls (+$42/mo)

pillars.title: Operational Excellence
pillars.description: Infrastructure as code deployment with comprehensive monitoring, automated configuration, and enterprise-grade operational visibility
practices: Infrastructure as Code with Pulumi for repeatable deployments
CloudWatch-based VPC Flow Logs for operational visibility
Configurable resource naming conventions for easy identification
VPC endpoints for centralized service access
Automated subnet and routing table configuration across 3 AZs
SSM endpoints for secure instance management

pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: Defense-in-depth with network segmentation, least-privilege access, and comprehensive audit logging
practices: Multi-tier security groups (web, app, database, access)
Private subnets for application and database tiers
VPC Flow Logs to CloudWatch for security monitoring and compliance
Isolated tier for maximum security database workloads
Network ACLs for additional subnet-level protection
VPC endpoints to reduce internet exposure
SSM endpoints for secure instance access without bastion hosts

pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: Multi-AZ architecture with redundant NAT infrastructure and fault-tolerant design for production workloads
practices: 3 Availability Zones for maximum fault tolerance
Redundant internet connectivity via Internet Gateway
3 NAT Gateways (one per AZ) for outbound HA
Isolated tier for critical database workloads
Multiple subnets per tier across availability zones
Automatic failover for NAT routing

pillars.title: Performance Efficiency
pillars.description: Optimizes network performance with proper subnet design, multi-AZ distribution, and VPC endpoint acceleration
practices: Dedicated subnets per tier for traffic isolation
3 NAT Gateways for distributed high-bandwidth outbound connectivity
VPC endpoints for direct AWS service access
Gateway endpoints for S3 and DynamoDB to reduce latency
Interface endpoints for SSM to minimize internet routing
Configurable CIDR ranges to avoid IP exhaustion

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Production-grade infrastructure with optimized resource sizing and configurable NAT deployment options
practices: Gateway VPC endpoints (S3, DynamoDB) are free
CloudWatch logs with configurable retention to manage costs
Optional single NAT Gateway mode for cost reduction (1 vs 3)
Right-sized subnets to minimize IP address waste
Configurable interface endpoints to balance cost vs security

pillars.title: Sustainability
pillars.description: Balances high availability with efficient resource utilization through smart deployment patterns
practices: Gateway VPC endpoints eliminate data transfer infrastructure
Right-sized network resources to avoid over-provisioning
Regional AWS services reduce data travel distances
Configurable NAT count for workload-appropriate redundancy

cidr_block.title: VPC CIDR Block
cidr_block.description: IPv4 CIDR block for the VPC (use 'random' for auto-generated)

enable_dns_support.title: Enable DNS Support
enable_dns_support.description: Enable DNS resolution in the VPC

enable_nat_gateway.title: Enable NAT Gateway
enable_nat_gateway.description: Creates NAT Gateway(s) for private subnet internet access

nat_gateway_count.title: NAT Gateway Count
nat_gateway_count.description: Number of NAT Gateways (1 or 3 for HA)

enable_flow_logs.title: Enable VPC Flow Logs
enable_flow_logs.description: Capture network traffic logs to S3 for security monitoring

flow_log_retention.title: Flow Logs Retention (days)
flow_log_retention.description: How long to retain flow logs in S3 before auto-deletion

enable_nacls.title: Enable Network ACLs
enable_nacls.description: Create Network ACLs for subnet-level security

enable_rds_endpoint.title: Enable RDS VPC Endpoint
enable_rds_endpoint.description: Interface endpoint for RDS API calls

enable_ssm_endpoints.title: Enable SSM VPC Endpoints
enable_ssm_endpoints.description: Private endpoints for AWS Systems Manager

resources.name: vpc-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}-{network_num}
resources.description: Virtual Private Cloud with CIDR {cidr_block}, DNS support enabled

resources.name: igw-main-{project}-{environment}-{region_short}
resources.description: Internet Gateway providing public internet connectivity for the VPC

smart_defaults.description: Security group for web tier - allows HTTP/HTTPS traffic

resources.description: S3 bucket lifecycle rules for automatic log retention and deletion
